summary.thesis: Stripe expressed preliminary acquisition interest in PayPal in late February 2026 causing a ~7% stock pop, but PayPal is reportedly not actively seeking a sale and no deal has materialized as of mid-March.
summary.method: Weighted search-snippet signals: strong initial buy-side signal (Bloomberg/CNBC) discounted by subsequent Semafor report that PayPal is not seeking a sale and no further deal progress in 4 weeks.
